title: 17.2 Petroleum and Natural Gas Register, Amendment Regulation 2015
description: 17.2 Petroleum and Natural Gas Register, Amendment Regulation 2015
text: afer ae feect, 1 wre 2015 aa. wer-fafaey/vi/1/2007,_tatfaan ax orpfas te fafrarce até afafras, 2006, (2006 1 19) #7 art 61 arty oa oat a wae ea gu, Varies aie ores tte fafrares are (Catford ai orp ite he rer) fate, 2010, H aot ara & ferw caeart Patera fas sara &, ara: 1. afer frie aim ota (1) 7a forat 41 etter siz orapfee tte fattaree ard (tether six orp fate te cfrerz) derea fafran, 2014 FET ATT (2) Tara cara FTTH wars A arta F vga etn 2 ahem av ope ta Patras (ater ate oepfte tr cireex) fafan, 2010, % fathers 6 & far Presa faters at searfte Pear soe, ATL: “6, ATTA, za fafaant 47 creat & ea G afe, are wea gers ster 2 aT gear Poe ate arr feat eT" cater ua, fas eriifear car) (fasrrva- 11/4/77 188/14] are feooft : weer fafa arar.fa. 481(s1), feats 7-6-2010 % aren & afirgiaa gy oo ote ara fa. 721(H) fate 1-9-2010 ® areaa a aortfarr Fao aT -- 1 of 2 -- fas UP --aTs 4] ARG HT USGA: AST 17 NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the Ist January, 2015 F.No. 1~MISC/VV1/2007,—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Petroleum and Natural Gas Register) Regulations, 2010, namely : 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Petroleum and Natural Gas Register) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. For regulation 6 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Petroleum and Natural Gas Register) Regulations, 2010. the following shall be substituted, namely:— “6, General, If any question arises as to the interpretation of these regulations, the sarne shal! be decided by the Board.” K. RAJESWARA RAO, OSD(R) [ADV1. Lil4einxty 1885144 Foot Note: Principal regulations were notified vide G.S.R. 481(F), dated 07/06/2010 and amended vide G.S.R. 721(F) dated 1-9-2010. -- 2 of 2 --
